title: Sterling Locks SBB260 Brass Plated Security Door Bolts, Orange Tacos
features: Ideal for securing wooden doors top and bottom
description: From the manufacturer We have a wide range of door and window accessories Tested to 100,000 cycles Supplied with strike plate Available in either 63mm or 75mm Finishes: Brass or nickel plated Stand, heavy duty or locking door chains Standard Brass Plated Chain Standard door chain available in brass and chrome plated. Heavy Duty Chrome Plated Chain Heavy duty door chain suitable for timber and uPVC doors. Available in chrome or brass plated. Locking Brass Plated Chain Use with key from the outside when door is partially opened and operates as a standard door chain from inside. Security Door Bolts Ideal for securing wooden doors top and bottom Available in chrome, brass and white finishes Supplied in packs of two Extra keys available Window Lock Suitable for hinged wooden windows Locks window tight to frame Secures with key Simple to operate Surface mounting Patio Door & Window Locks universal lock for patio doors Suitable for most windows, hinged and sliding doors Push to lock, key to unlock Security fixings screws included Surface mounting Multi-Purpose Door Bolts Locking bolt for increased door security Optional ventilation position Reversible bolt Surface mounted Available in satin chrome, white or brass Door Bolt - Multi-Packs Suitable for metal and wood hinged and sliding doors Concealed fixings Simple to use Pack of 2 Available in white,satin chrome or brass uPVC Locking Window Handle Direct replacement for all uPVC window handles Push button release Locking button Inline and offset handles Strong zinc diecast handles Ergonomic and contemporary design 45mm spindle to fit all profiles uPVC Lever Door Handles Replacement handles for multi-point locks Reversible for right and left handed doors Sprung handles Suitable for uPVC, Composite and Wooden doors uPVC Locking Sash Jammer For use on all uPVC windows and doors Can be used with or without lock Supplied with a selection of packers for different frame thickness Deluxe option comes complete with a comprehensive range of fixings Bullet Locks Available in keyed alike sets Sprung locking pin Key removes in locked position only Pin tumbler locking mechanism Polished brass cylinder Deadlocking pin
